requirement_topic.en: PV Module Type-Approval — Performance and Extended-Stress Reliability (IEC 61215 + IEC TS 63209)
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏组件型式认证——性能与扩展应力可靠性（IEC 61215 + IEC TS 63209）
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏組件型式認證——性能與擴展應力可靠性（IEC 61215 + IEC TS 63209）

summary.en: EU market access for PV modules (including perovskite and perovskite-silicon tandem) depends on demonstrating conformity with IEC 61215-1/-2 (design qualification and type approval — electrical, mechanical, thermal performance) and IEC 61215-1-1 (crystalline silicon) or the applicable technology-specific part. Power and energy rating must follow IEC 61853-1/-2/-3/-4. For emerging chemistries such as perovskite, extended-stress reliability testing under IEC TS 63209-1 (module-level) and IEC TS 63209-2:2022 (polymeric component materials) is increasingly required by financiers, insurers, and certification bodies to evidence long-term degradation behaviour under heat, UV, and moisture. CE marking for PV modules is not mandated by a single PV-specific EU directive; modules must satisfy the Low Voltage Directive (2014/35/EU) and, where applicable, the CPR (305/2011/EU) for building-integrated applications. The EU Solar Energy Strategy and emerging Ecodesign/Energy-label framework for PV As of mid-2026, no adopted Ecodesign Regulation (ESPR implementing measure) specifically for PV modules is in force; the EU ESPR Working Plan (adopted April 2025) includes PV modules as a future product group, and the JRC published carbon-footprint methodology guidance in July 2025, but no implementing regulation has been enacted. may introduce additional minimum performance requirements.
summary.zh: 光伏组件（含钙钛矿及钙钛矿-硅叠层）进入欧盟市场须符合IEC 61215-1/-2（设计鉴定与型式认证——电气、机械、热性能）及相应技术专项子部分。功率与能量额定须遵循IEC 61853-1/-2/-3/-4。对于钙钛矿等新兴化学类型，IEC TS 63209-1（组件级扩展应力）及IEC TS 63209-2:2022（聚合物组件材料）的扩展可靠性测试日益受到金融机构、保险公司及认证机构的要求，以证明其在热、紫外及湿气条件下的长期衰减行为。欧盟无专门针对光伏组件的单一CE标志指令；组件须符合低电压指令（2014/35/EU），建筑集成应用还须符合建筑产品法规（305/2011/EU）。欧盟太阳能战略及拟议中的光伏生态设计/能源标签框架截至2026年中期，尚无已生效的光伏组件专项生态设计法规（ESPR实施措施）；欧盟ESPR工作计划（2025年4月通过）已将光伏组件列为未来产品组，联合研究中心亦于2025年7月发布碳足迹方法论指南，但相关实施法规尚未颁布。或将引入最低性能要求。
summary.zht: 光伏組件（含鈣鈦礦及鈣鈦礦-矽疊層）進入歐盟市場須符合IEC 61215-1/-2（設計鑒定與型式認證——電氣、機械、熱性能）及相應技術專項子部分。功率與能量額定須遵循IEC 61853-1/-2/-3/-4。對於鈣鈦礦等新興化學類型，IEC TS 63209-1（組件級擴展應力）及IEC TS 63209-2:2022（聚合物組件材料）的擴展可靠性測試日益受到金融機構、保險公司及認證機構的要求，以證明其在熱、紫外及濕氣條件下的長期衰減行為。歐盟無專門針對光伏組件的單一CE標誌指令；組件須符合低電壓指令（2014/35/EU），建築集成應用還須符合建築產品法規（305/2011/EU）。歐盟太陽能戰略及擬議中的光伏生態設計/能源標籤框架截至2026年中期，尚無已生效的光伏組件專項生態設計法規（ESPR實施措施）；歐盟ESPR工作計畫（2025年4月通過）已將光伏組件列為未來產品組，聯合研究中心亦於2025年7月發布碳足跡方法論指南，但相關實施法規尚未頒布。或將引入最低性能要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61215-1:2021 (PV modules — Design qualification and type approval — Part 1: Test requirements)
IEC 61853-1:2011 / IEC 61853-2:2016 / IEC 61853-3:2018 / IEC 61853-4:2018 (PV module power and energy rating)
IEC TS 63209-2:2022 (Extended-stress testing — Part 2: Polymeric component materials)
Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive — applicable to PV modules)
Regulation (EU) 305/2011 (Construction Products Regulation — BIPV scope; verify applicability per installation type)
EU Solar Energy Strategy COM(2022) 221 (policy communication, not directly binding regulation)

summary.en: GB/T 37409-2019 is the principal Chinese national standard for PV module type-approval testing, closely aligned with IEC 61215 in test sequence and pass/fail criteria. Chinese certification (CQC, CGC) against GB/T 37409 is required for domestic grid-connection approval under the National Energy Administration framework. However, GB/T 37409 does not yet incorporate the extended-stress test sequences of IEC TS 63209 that are specifically intended to expose accelerated degradation in novel chemistries such as perovskite. Chinese manufacturers typically test to IEC 61215 directly for export certification rather than relying solely on GB/T 37409.
summary.zh: GB/T 37409-2019是中国光伏组件型式认证测试的主要国家标准，测试序列及合格判据与IEC 61215高度接近。在国家能源局体系下，国内并网须取得依据GB/T 37409的CQC或CGC认证。但GB/T 37409尚未纳入IEC TS 63209专为检测钙钛矿等新化学类型加速衰减而设计的扩展应力测试序列。中国制造商出口认证通常直接依据IEC 61215，而非单独依赖GB/T 37409。
summary.zht: GB/T 37409-2019是中國光伏組件型式認證測試的主要國家標準，測試序列及合格判據與IEC 61215高度接近。在國家能源局體系下，國內並網須取得依據GB/T 37409的CQC或CGC認證。但GB/T 37409尚未納入IEC TS 63209專為檢測鈣鈦礦等新化學類型加速衰減而設計的擴展應力測試序列。中國製造商出口認證通常直接依據IEC 61215，而非單獨依賴GB/T 37409。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37409-2019 (Terrestrial photovoltaic modules — Design qualification and type approval)

gap.en: The critical gap for perovskite PV modules is long-term reliability evidence. IEC 61215 type-approval was designed around mature crystalline silicon and thin-film chemistries; its standard damp-heat (1000 h, 85 °C/85% RH), UV (15 kWh/m²), and thermal-cycling (200 cycles) sequences were not calibrated to expose the accelerated ion migration, moisture ingress, and phase degradation mechanisms that are characteristic of perovskite absorbers. IEC TS 63209 extends these stresses (e.g., 2000 h damp-heat, extended UV, combined UV+damp-heat) to better discriminate long-term field degradation, but it is a Technical Specification (not a full IEC Standard) and test laboratories differ in how they apply it. EU project financiers, grid operators, and independent engineers (IEs) routinely demand IEC TS 63209 data before bankability sign-off for perovskite modules; CN domestic certification does not yet require this. The result is that a perovskite module passing GB/T 37409 and even IEC 61215 may lack the field-lifetime evidence required by EU off-takers, insurers, and lenders. No CN standard currently addresses perovskite-specific degradation modes. Additionally, no Ecodesign/Energy-label implementing regulation for PV modules is in force as of mid-2026; the EU ESPR Working Plan (April 2025) includes PV modules as a future priority product group. Monitor EU regulatory calendar for the forthcoming implementing measure.
gap.zh: 钙钛矿光伏组件的核心差距在于长期可靠性证明。IEC 61215型式认证以成熟的晶硅及薄膜技术为基础，其标准湿热（1000小时、85°C/85%RH）、紫外（15 kWh/m²）及热循环（200次）测试序列，并未针对钙钛矿吸收层特有的离子迁移加速、湿气渗透及相降解机制进行校准。IEC TS 63209通过延长应力（如2000小时湿热、延长紫外、紫外+湿热复合等）更好地区分长期现场衰减，但其仍为技术规范（非正式IEC标准），各实验室执行方式存在差异。欧盟项目融资方、电网运营商及独立工程师在为钙钛矿组件出具可融资性意见前，通常要求提供IEC TS 63209数据；中国国内认证尚无此要求。因此，通过GB/T 37409甚至IEC 61215的钙钛矿组件，可能仍缺乏欧盟采购方、保险公司及贷款方所要求的现场寿命证明。目前中国尚无标准专门针对钙钛矿特有降解模式。此外，截至2026年中期，针对光伏组件的生态设计/能源标签实施法规尚未生效；欧盟ESPR工作计划（2025年4月）已将光伏组件列为未来优先产品组。请持续关注欧盟监管日历，关注即将出台的实施措施。
gap.zht: 鈣鈦礦光伏組件的核心差距在於長期可靠性證明。IEC 61215型式認證以成熟的晶矽及薄膜技術為基礎，其標準濕熱（1000小時、85°C/85%RH）、紫外（15 kWh/m²）及熱循環（200次）測試序列，並未針對鈣鈦礦吸收層特有的離子遷移加速、濕氣滲透及相降解機制進行校準。IEC TS 63209通過延長應力（如2000小時濕熱、延長紫外、紫外+濕熱複合等）更好地區分長期現場衰減，但其仍為技術規範（非正式IEC標準），各實驗室執行方式存在差異。歐盟項目融資方、電網運營商及獨立工程師在為鈣鈦礦組件出具可融資性意見前，通常要求提供IEC TS 63209數據；中國國內認證尚無此要求。因此，通過GB/T 37409甚至IEC 61215的鈣鈦礦組件，可能仍缺乏歐盟採購方、保險公司及貸款方所要求的現場壽命證明。目前中國尚無標準專門針對鈣鈦礦特有降解模式。此外，截至2026年中期，針對光伏組件的生態設計/能源標籤實施法規尚未生效；歐盟ESPR工作計畫（2025年4月）已將光伏組件列為未來優先產品組。請持續關注歐盟監管日曆，關注即將出台的實施措施。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (IEC 61215 type-approval via accredited CB); IEC TS 63209 de facto required by EU financiers and IEs for perovskite bankability
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic grid-connection (GB/T 37409 via CQC/CGC); IEC TS 63209 not required domestically

source.publisher: IEC (International Electrotechnical Commission) — IEC 61215-1:2021 catalog page

compliance_verdict.en: Attention required. Perovskite PV modules must complete IEC 61215 type-approval (available via accredited CB test labs) and, critically for EU bankability, must generate IEC TS 63209 extended-stress test data addressing heat, UV, and moisture degradation modes specific to perovskite absorbers. Passing IEC 61215 alone is insufficient for EU project finance and insurance acceptance. GB/T 37409 certification covers domestic CN grid-connection but does not substitute for EU-facing IEC 61215 certification or IEC TS 63209 reliability evidence. No Ecodesign/Energy-label implementing regulation for PV modules is in force as of mid-2026; monitor EU regulatory calendar for the forthcoming ESPR implementing measure.
compliance_verdict.zh: 需重点关注。钙钛矿光伏组件须完成IEC 61215型式认证（通过认可的CB测试实验室），且对欧盟可融资性至关重要的是，还须提供针对钙钛矿吸收层热、紫外及湿气特有降解模式的IEC TS 63209扩展应力测试数据。仅通过IEC 61215不足以满足欧盟项目融资及保险认可的要求。GB/T 37409认证适用于国内并网，不能替代面向欧盟的IEC 61215认证或IEC TS 63209可靠性证明。截至2026年中期，针对光伏组件的生态设计/能源标签实施法规尚未生效；请持续关注欧盟监管日历，跟踪即将出台的ESPR实施措施。
compliance_verdict.zht: 需重點關注。鈣鈦礦光伏組件須完成IEC 61215型式認證（通過認可的CB測試實驗室），且對歐盟可融資性至關重要的是，還須提供針對鈣鈦礦吸收層熱、紫外及濕氣特有降解模式的IEC TS 63209擴展應力測試數據。僅通過IEC 61215不足以滿足歐盟項目融資及保險認可的要求。GB/T 37409認證適用於國內並網，不能替代面向歐盟的IEC 61215認證或IEC TS 63209可靠性證明。截至2026年中期，針對光伏組件的生態設計/能源標籤實施法規尚未生效；請持續關注歐盟監管日曆，跟蹤即將出台的ESPR實施措施。

requirement_topic.zh: WEEE生产者登记——光伏组件（指令2012/19/EU）
requirement_topic.zht: WEEE生產者登記——光伏組件（指令2012/19/EU）

summary.en: Directive 2012/19/EU (WEEE Directive, recast) explicitly includes photovoltaic panels in its scope. Under the open-scope regime effective 15 August 2018, PV panels fall under Annex III Category 4 (Large Equipment, any external dimension >50 cm); sub-category 4b (Photovoltaic panels) was formalised in Commission Implementing Decision 2019/2193. There is no 'Category 11' in the WEEE Directive — Category 11 is a category in RoHS Annex I (Other EEE), not WEEE. Producers — defined to include importers placing PV panels on the EU market under their own brand or as the first importer — must register in each EU Member State where they sell, finance end-of-life collection and treatment, and mark products with the crossed-out wheeled bin symbol. Member States have transposed the directive into national law with varying registration procedures, fees, and reporting obligations (e.g., Germany: ElektroG / EAR register; France: eco-organization scheme; Netherlands: Wecycle). A non-EU manufacturer must appoint a local Authorised Representative in each Member State to fulfil these obligations. Perovskite modules are in scope identically to crystalline silicon panels; no chemistry-specific exemption exists.
summary.zh: 指令2012/19/EU（WEEE指令重铸版）明确将光伏面板纳入适用范围。依据2018年8月15日起生效的开放式适用范围制度，光伏面板属于附件III第4类大型设备（任一外部尺寸>50厘米）；欧委会2019/2193号实施决定正式确立了子类4b（光伏面板）。WEEE指令中不存在「第11类」——第11类属于RoHS附件I（其他EEE），与WEEE无关。生产者（定义涵盖以自有品牌在欧盟市场投放光伏面板的进口商或首次进口商）须在每个销售所在欧盟成员国进行登记，资助报废收集与处理，并在产品上标注划叉垃圾桶符号。各成员国将该指令转化为国内法，登记程序、费用及报告义务各有不同（例如德国：ElektroG/EAR登记册；法国：生态组织方案；荷兰：Wecycle）。非欧盟制造商须在每个成员国委任当地授权代表以履行上述义务。钙钛矿组件与晶硅面板适用范围相同，不存在针对特定化学材料的豁免。
summary.zht: 指令2012/19/EU（WEEE指令重鑄版）明確將光伏面板納入適用範圍。依據2018年8月15日起生效的開放式適用範圍制度，光伏面板屬於附件III第4類大型設備（任一外部尺寸>50厘米）；歐委會2019/2193號實施決定正式確立了子類4b（光伏面板）。WEEE指令中不存在「第11類」——第11類屬於RoHS附件I（其他EEE），與WEEE無關。生產者（定義涵蓋以自有品牌在歐盟市場投放光伏面板的進口商或首次進口商）須在每個銷售所在歐盟成員國進行登記，資助報廢收集與處理，並在產品上標注劃叉垃圾桶符號。各成員國將該指令轉化為國內法，登記程序、費用及報告義務各有不同（例如德國：ElektroG/EAR登記冊；法國：生態組織方案；荷蘭：Wecycle）。非歐盟製造商須在每個成員國委任當地授權代表以履行上述義務。鈣鈦礦組件與晶矽面板適用範圍相同，不存在針對特定化學材料的豁免。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2012/19/EU (WEEE Directive, recast) — Annex III Category 4 (sub-category 4b: Photovoltaic panels, per Commission Implementing Decision 2019/2193)

summary.en: China has no export-side obligation equivalent to EU WEEE producer registration. Domestically, the 'Regulations on the Administration of the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products' (废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例, State Council Order No. 551, 2009, amended 2019) impose collection-fund contributions and disposal obligations on domestic sellers and manufacturers, but these apply to products sold within China and do not create any corresponding registration duty for goods exported to the EU. Chinese PV module manufacturers exporting to Europe are therefore entirely unregistered on the CN side with respect to EU WEEE obligations.
summary.zh: 中国出口端没有对应欧盟WEEE生产者登记义务的制度。国内依据《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（国务院令第551号，2009年颁布，2019年修订）对国内销售商和制造商征收回收基金及处理义务，但仅适用于在中国境内销售的产品，不为出口欧盟的商品创设任何对应的登记义务。因此，出口欧洲的中国光伏组件制造商在中国侧完全没有与欧盟WEEE义务相关的登记。
summary.zht: 中國出口端沒有對應歐盟WEEE生產者登記義務的制度。國內依據《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（國務院令第551號，2009年頒布，2019年修訂）對國內銷售商和製造商徵收回收基金及處理義務，但僅適用於在中國境內銷售的產品，不為出口歐盟的商品創設任何對應的登記義務。因此，出口歐洲的中國光伏組件製造商在中國側完全沒有與歐盟WEEE義務相關的登記。

standards_or_laws: 废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例 (State Council Order No. 551, 2009, amended 2019) — domestic scope only

gap.en: WEEE producer registration is a concrete per-country administrative prerequisite with no Chinese analogue. For perovskite modules there is an additional concern: lead (Pb) is present in many perovskite absorber formulations (e.g., methylammonium lead iodide, MAPbI3). The presence of a regulated hazardous substance (lead) in the module raises the urgency of proper WEEE registration and end-of-life management, since uncontrolled disposal could result in lead leaching — a risk that regulators, NGOs, and EU member-state environmental agencies may scrutinise more closely than for standard silicon modules. This does not alter the registration procedure but it strengthens the compliance and reputational case for robust WEEE compliance. Additionally, perovskite modules are not yet subject to a chemistry-specific WEEE collection target, but the standard PV panel obligations apply in full. Chinese manufacturers frequently lack this registration; the per-country fragmentation and cost (authorised representative fees, eco-contribution levies) are the most common barriers.
gap.zh: WEEE生产者登记是按国家分别执行的具体行政前提条件，中国侧无对应制度。对于钙钛矿组件还存在额外关注点：许多钙钛矿吸收层配方（如甲胺铅碘MAPbI3）含有铅（Pb）这一受管制有害物质。组件中存在铅，使得规范的WEEE登记和报废管理更加紧迫，因不当处置可能导致铅溶出——监管机构、非政府组织及欧盟成员国环境机构对此的审查可能比标准硅基组件更严格。这不改变登记程序本身，但进一步强化了严格执行WEEE合规的必要性和声誉理由。此外，钙钛矿组件目前尚无化学成分专项WEEE回收目标，但适用标准光伏面板的全部义务。中国制造商普遍缺乏此项登记；按国家分散管理及相关费用（授权代表费、生态贡献税）是最常见的障碍。
gap.zht: WEEE生產者登記是按國家分別執行的具體行政前提條件，中國側無對應制度。對於鈣鈦礦組件還存在額外關注點：許多鈣鈦礦吸收層配方（如甲胺鉛碘MAPbI3）含有鉛（Pb）這一受管制有害物質。組件中存在鉛，使得規範的WEEE登記和報廢管理更加緊迫，因不當處置可能導致鉛溶出——監管機構、非政府組織及歐盟成員國環境機構對此的審查可能比標準矽基組件更嚴格。這不改變登記程序本身，但進一步強化了嚴格執行WEEE合規的必要性和聲譽理由。此外，鈣鈦礦組件目前尚無化學成分專項WEEE回收目標，但適用標準光伏面板的全部義務。中國製造商普遍缺乏此項登記；按國家分散管理及相關費用（授權代表費、生態貢獻稅）是最常見的障礙。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required before placing PV panels on market in each EU Member State
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent export-side obligation (domestic end-of-life rules apply to domestic sellers only)

compliance_verdict.en: Attention required. Per-member-state WEEE registration (or appointment of an authorised representative) is a mandatory administrative prerequisite with no Chinese equivalent. For lead-containing perovskite formulations, proper WEEE end-of-life compliance also carries environmental and reputational significance beyond administrative box-ticking. Chinese perovskite module exporters to the EU must budget for authorised representative appointments and eco-contribution levies in each target market before first sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: 需重点关注。WEEE按成员国登记（或委任授权代表）是强制性行政前提条件，中国侧无对应制度。对于含铅钙钛矿配方，规范履行WEEE报废义务除行政合规外，还具有重要的环境与声誉意义。中国钙钛矿组件出口商在首次向欧盟目标市场销售前，须为各目标市场的授权代表委任及生态贡献税预留预算。
compliance_verdict.zht: 需重點關注。WEEE按成員國登記（或委任授權代表）是強制性行政前提條件，中國側無對應制度。對於含鉛鈣鈦礦配方，規範履行WEEE報廢義務除行政合規外，還具有重要的環境與聲譽意義。中國鈣鈦礦組件出口商在首次向歐盟目標市場銷售前，須為各目標市場的授權代表委任及生態貢獻稅預留預算。
